verify_web() { make serve & pid=$!; sleep 90; code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000); [ $code -eq 200 ] && echo "Setup successful" || echo "Setup failed"; pgid=$(ps -o pgid= $pid | tr -d ' '); kill -TERM -$pgid 2>/dev/null; }; verify_web || echo "Setup failed"

verify_multi_worker() { HTTP_PORT=3001 P2P_PORT=6001 npm start & pid1=$!; sleep 45; HTTP_PORT=3002 P2P_PORT=6002 PEERS=ws://localhost:6001 npm start & pid2=$!; sleep 45; code=$(curl -s -H "Content-type:application/json" --data '{"data" : "Some data to the first block"}' -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/mineBlock); [ $code -eq 200 ] && echo "Setup successful" || echo "Setup failed"; pgid1=$(ps -o pgid= $pid1 | tr -d ' '); pgid2=$(ps -o pgid= $pid2 | tr -d ' '); kill -TERM -$pgid1 2>/dev/null; kill -TERM -$pgid2 2>/dev/null; }; verify_multi_worker || echo "Setup failed"
